title: [GATE] P11: Full E2E validation — fresh deploy, Futu live, 1-hour soak
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Fresh macOS: git clone + ./deploy.sh --with-futu
- [ ] Full stack healthy, QuoteTick arrives, order fills journal to PG
- [ ] Dashboard shows live data, sam status healthy
- [ ] 1-hour soak: no crashes, no disconnects
- [ ] ./deploy.sh --stop cleans up

## Tests
- Manual operator validation following DEPLOY_GUIDE.md

title: P11: User documentation — deploy guide, bundle guide, operator guide
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] docs/user/DEPLOY_GUIDE.md (prerequisites, quick start, troubleshooting)
- [ ] docs/user/BUNDLE_GUIDE.md (schema, symbology, examples, validation)
- [ ] docs/user/OPERATOR_GUIDE.md (daily checklist, monitoring, incident response)

title: P11: First-run wizard — interactive .env generation
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Interactive prompts for Futu, IB, trader ID, environment
- [ ] Write .env from template, validate inputs, mask passwords

## Port from v2
- ~/Trading/csam_trader/deploy.sh wizard section

title: P11: deploy.sh — single-script deploy with profiles
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Portable bash: --with-futu, --with-ib, --with-services, --restart, --stop
- [ ] Git pull/clone, sequential start with health gating
- [ ] Under 300 lines

## Port from v2
- ~/Trading/csam_trader/deploy.sh

title: Phase 11: Deploy Script & E2E Validation
description:
## Goal
Single-script deploy. First-run wizard. All profiles work. Full E2E gate passes.

## Children (4)
Port deploy.sh from v2, restructure for sam-services decoupling.

## Depends on
Phase 10

title: [EXIT] P10: Verify dashboard + safety controls
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Dashboard loads in browser, all sections populated
- [ ] Kill switch triggered → all orders cancelled
- [ ] Circuit breaker trips at daily loss threshold

## Tests
- tests/integration/test_dashboard.py

title: P10: Static HTML dashboard — portfolio, fills, health, scans
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Single-page HTML dashboard served by FastAPI
- [ ] Auto-refreshing, portfolio table, fills table, health indicators, alerts
- [ ] No external CDN dependencies (self-contained)

title: P10: FastAPI backend — health, positions, fills, scan results endpoints
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] FastAPI app in sam-services container
- [ ] GET /health, /api/positions, /api/fills, /api/scans/latest, /api/alerts
- [ ] CORS for localhost dashboard access

title: P10: Dashboard database — portfolio snapshots, scan history, alert log
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] New PG tables: portfolio_snapshots, pipeline_runs, alert_log
- [ ] Populated by sam-services cron jobs

title: P10: Safety controls — kill switch, circuit breakers, emergency halt
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Kill switch: immediate cancel-all + stop trading (all venues)
- [ ] Circuit breakers: daily loss limit, margin limit, connection loss
- [ ] Emergency halt: operator-triggered
- [ ] Sam CLI: sam kill, sam halt

## Reference
- docs/reference/pre-market_req/6. premarket-safety-controls.md

title: Phase 10: Safety & Dashboard
description:
## Goal
Kill switch, circuit breakers, FastAPI backend, dashboard UI. Safety controls for risk management. Web dashboard for monitoring.

## Children (5)
All new.

## Depends on
Phase 9

title: [EXIT] P9: Pipeline runs end-to-end, produces valid bundles
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Run pipeline on pre-market data
- [ ] Pipeline produces >= 1 candidate, risk checks pass
- [ ] Bundle YAML generated and passes validation
- [ ] Sam CLI: sam pipeline run completes

## Tests
- tests/integration/test_pipeline_e2e.py

title: P9: Pipeline orchestrator — sequential executor, sanity check, bundle creator, readiness report
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Run pipeline steps in sequence: scan → AI → risk → regime → bundles
- [ ] Pre-market sanity check, bundle YAML generator, readiness report
- [ ] Sam CLI: sam pipeline run

## Reference
- docs/reference/pre-market_req/5. premarket-orchestration-handoff.md

title: P9: Market regime detection — HMM-based classification, regime-aware adaptation
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] HMM regime classifier: trending, ranging, volatile
- [ ] Output: regime label + transition probability
- [ ] Regime-aware parameter adaptation

## Reference
- docs/reference/pre-market_req/4. premarket-regime-detection.md

title: P9: Risk manager — Monte Carlo sizer, pre-trade checks, portfolio heat monitor
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Monte Carlo simulation for position sizing (VaR, CVaR)
- [ ] Pre-trade risk checks (max exposure, daily loss, margin)
- [ ] Portfolio heat monitor, integrity checker

## Reference
- docs/reference/pre-market_req/3. premarket-risk-position-sizing.md

title: P9: AI scoring engine — candidate evaluation, recommendation grading
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Score gap candidates via AI (DeepSeek / Moonshot Kimi K2.6)
- [ ] Output: recommendation grade (STRONG_BUY, BUY, HOLD, SKIP) + confidence + reasoning
- [ ] Rule-based fast path for clear signals
- [ ] Configurable AI provider and model

## Reference
- docs/reference/pre-market_req/2. premarket-ai-analysis.md

title: P9: Gap scanner — pre-market gaps, filter rules, HK+US markets
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Scan Futu market data for gap candidates
- [ ] Configurable gap thresholds, blacklist, trend-down filter, deduplication
- [ ] Output: ranked candidate list (symbol, gap_pct, volume, sector)
- [ ] HK and US market support

## Reference
- docs/reference/pre-market_req/1. premarket-gap-discovery.md

title: Phase 9: Pre-Market Pipeline
description:
## Goal
Gap scanner → AI analysis → risk manager → bundle generator → readiness report. Full autonomous pre-market pipeline.

## Children (6)
All new. Pipeline runs in sam-services cron.

## Depends on
Phase 8

title: [EXIT] P8: Verify sam-services — starts, CLI works, cron runs, decoupled
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] docker compose --profile services up -d
- [ ] sam status, sam health, sam backup all work
- [ ] Cron daemon running
- [ ] Restart sam-services → sam-trader unaffected

## Tests
- tests/integration/test_services.py

title: P8: Deploy decoupling — move ops commands from deploy.sh to sam-services
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Remove from deploy.sh: --status, --health, --backup, --restore, --quote, --logs
- [ ] Keep in deploy.sh: setup wizard, --with-futu, --with-ib, --restart, --stop, git pull, docker build, compose up/down
- [ ] Deploy.sh under 300 lines

title: P8: Quote fetcher — extend for Futu cache support
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] quote.py with Futu + IB support
- [ ] sam quote TSLA.NASDAQ → bid/ask/last from Redis cache
- [ ] Fallback: query broker directly if cache miss

## Port from v2
- ~/Trading/csam_trader/src/csam_trader/quote.py

title: P8: Cron scheduler — daily backup, log rotation, pipeline schedules
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Cron daemon in sam-services
- [ ] Daily backup at 16:30 ET, log rotation at 03:00 HKT
- [ ] Crontab configurable via env vars

title: P8: sam CLI tool — status, health, backup, restore, logs, restart
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Python CLI (click): sam status, sam health, sam backup, sam restore, sam logs, sam restart, sam quote
- [ ] sam status → docker ps + health summary
- [ ] sam health → deep health check (PG, Redis, Futu OpenD, Nautilus)

title: P8: Dockerfile.services — lightweight Python 3.12 for operations
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] docker/Dockerfile.services: FROM python:3.12-slim
- [ ] Install: fastapi, uvicorn, httpx, asyncpg, cron, pyyaml
- [ ] Mount: /var/run/docker.sock (ro), config/, logs/, backups/
- [ ] Port: 8080

title: Phase 8: sam-services Container
description:
## Goal
Operations container with CLI, cron, health checks, backup, quote fetcher. Decoupled from sam-trader.

## Children (6)
New container for all operational concerns.

## Depends on
Phase 4 (needs Futu data for health checks)

title: [EXIT] P5: Dual-venue TradingNode (Futu + IB)
description:

- [ ] Start TradingNode with both Futu + IB factories

- [ ] Both strategies instantiated
- [ ] Data flows from both venues
- [ ] No cross-venue contamination
- [ ] Both venues visible in Portfolio

- tests/integration/test_dual_venue.py: test_futu_and_ib_strategies_coexist

title: P5: Enhance IBKR adapter for v3 patterns
description:

- [ ] IB config uses SamTraderConfig fields
- [ ] Venue aliasing consistent with Futu
- [ ] No subscription conflicts between Futu and IB
- [ ] IB data/exec clients respect ib_enabled flag
- [ ] Clean separation: IB symbols dont leak to Futu subscriptions

description:

Port IBKR adapter from v2. Enhanced for multi-venue coexistence. Both Futu + IB work simultaneously in same TradingNode.

Phase 4

title: [EXIT] P4: Futu-only TradingNode — subscribe, receive data, instruments resolve
description:

- [ ] Load 1 Futu bundle (TSLA.NASDAQ)
- [ ] Strategy instantiated
- [ ] Quote ticks arrive on message bus
- [ ] Instrument resolution works (TSLA.NASDAQ → US.TSLA → QuoteTick)

- tests/integration/test_futu_node.py: test_futu_trading_node_with_bundle

title: P4: Bundle support for Futu venue
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] BundleLoader validates venue: FUTU
- [ ] instrument_id: "TSLA.NASDAQ" maps to Futu US.TSLA internally
- [ ] instrument_id: "00700.HKEX" maps to Futu HK.00700 internally
- [ ] Futu-specific risk params if needed (trd_market, trd_env)
- [ ] bundles.example.yaml updated with Futu examples (TSLA.NASDAQ, 00700.HKEX)
- [ ] Backward compatible: venue: IB still works

## Tests
- tests/unit/test_bundle_loader.py: test_futu_bundle_parsed, test_futu_symbology_mapping, test_futu_and_ib_coexist

title: P4: Wire Futu factories into main.py TradingNode
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] In build_trading_node(): conditional Futu factory registration
- [ ] Gate: futu_enabled flag from SamTraderConfig
- [ ] Create FutuDataClientConfig + FutuExecClientConfig from env vars
- [ ] data_clients["FUTU"] = FutuDataClientConfig(...)
- [ ] exec_clients["FUTU"] = FutuExecClientConfig(...)
- [ ] node.add_data_client_factory("FUTU", FutuLiveDataClientFactory)
- [ ] node.add_exec_client_factory("FUTU", FutuLiveExecClientFactory)
- [ ] Lazy imports: try/except ImportError with clear messages

## Tests
- tests/unit/test_main.py: test_futu_factories_registered, test_futu_disabled_flag

title: P4: Futu factories — FutuLiveDataClientFactory, FutuLiveExecClientFactory
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] adapters/futu/factories.py
- [ ] FutuLiveDataClientFactory: creates FutuLiveDataClient with shared quote context
- [ ] FutuLiveExecClientFactory: creates FutuLiveExecutionClient with shared trade context
- [ ] Shared client pattern: _get_shared_quote_context, _get_shared_trade_context
- [ ] One OpenQuoteContext + OpenSecTradeContext per (host, port, trd_env)
- [ ] Adapt from nautilus-futu factories.py

## Tests
- tests/unit/adapters/futu/test_factories.py: test_create_data_client, test_create_exec_client, test_shared_context

title: P4: FutuInstrumentProvider — load HK+US instruments from Futu
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] adapters/futu/instrument_provider.py — subclass InstrumentProvider
- [ ] load_all_async via get_static_info for all markets
- [ ] load_ids_async via get_static_info for specific securities
- [ ] security_to_instrument_id using venue mapping
- [ ] HK.00700 → 00700.HKEX, US.AAPL → AAPL.NASDAQ
- [ ] Caching of loaded instruments
- [ ] Instrument auto-loading from position data (unknown instrument → fetch static info)
- [ ] Symbology: use Nautilus standard (AAPL.NASDAQ) in bundles, map to Futu (US.AAPL) internally

## Tests
- tests/unit/adapters/futu/test_instrument_provider.py: test_load_ids, test_symbology_mapping

- [ ] _parse_futu_equity: stock_basicinfo → Nautilus Equity
- [ ] _parse_futu_option: option_basicinfo → Nautilus OptionContract
- [ ] _parse_futu_future: future_basicinfo → Nautilus FuturesContract

title: Phase 4: Futu Instrument Provider & TradingNode Integration

FutuInstrumentProvider resolves HK+US symbols. Factories wired into TradingNode. Futu bundles loadable. Full Futu-only TradingNode operational.

Phase 3

title: [EXIT] P2: Market data subscription → QuoteTick flow
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Subscribe to TSLA.NASDAQ via FutuLiveDataClient
- [ ] Receive QuoteTick on Nautilus message bus within 5s
- [ ] Verify bid/ask/last prices populated
- [ ] Unsubscribe → no more ticks
- [ ] Subscription quota manager increments/decrements correctly

title: P2: Futu subscription quota manager
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] adapters/futu/subscription_manager.py
- [ ] Tracks active subscriptions per data type (quote, order_book, kline)
- [ ] MAX_QUOTE_SUBS=100, MAX_ORDER_BOOK_SUBS=50, MAX_KLINES_SUBS=100 (Futu limits)
- [ ] Prioritize enabled-bundle instruments over ad-hoc subscriptions
- [ ] Release unused subscriptions after 1min idle
- [ ] Log WARNING at 80% limit, ERROR at 95% limit
- [ ] Thread-safe (lock per data type)

## Tests
- tests/unit/adapters/futu/test_subscription_manager.py: test_track_subscription, test_quota_warning, test_quota_error, test_release_idle, test_priority_bundles

- [ ] subscribe/unsubscribe for quote ticks, trade ticks, bars, order book
- [ ] _subscribe_quote_tick, _subscribe_trade_tick, _subscribe_bars, _subscribe_order_book
- [ ] Reconnection with subscription restoration (restore all prior subs)
- [ ] Historical bar backfill at connect time
- [ ] Config-driven: host, port, trd_env from FutuDataClientConfig
- [ ] Adapt push-loop pattern from nautilus-futu data.py

## Reference
- nautilus-futu data.py — push channel isolation + subscription restore
- Nautilus LiveMarketDataClient base class

description:

- [ ] FutuExecClientConfig: frozen, inherits LiveExecClientConfig
- [ ] Fields: host, port, trd_env, trd_market, client_id

- Nautilus LiveDataClientConfig / LiveExecClientConfig base classes

description:

title: P2: Port Futu connection manager from v2
description:

title: Phase 2: Futu Market Data Adapter
description:
## Goal
FutuLiveDataClient streams QuoteTick, TradeTick, Bar, OrderBookDelta to Nautilus message bus. Subscription quota manager tracks usage. Parsing module centralizes all Futu→Nautilus type conversions.

## Children (7)
- sam-p2-connection: Port connection manager
- sam-p2-constants: Futu constants + venue mappings
- sam-p2-config-dc: FutuDataClientConfig + FutuExecClientConfig
- sam-p2-parsing: Parsing module (market data)
- sam-p2-data-client: FutuLiveDataClient
- sam-p2-sub-mgr: Subscription quota manager
- sam-p2-exit-data: Exit test

## Depends on
Phase 1

## Exit
Subscribe to TSLA.NASDAQ → QuoteTick on message bus within 5s.

title: Phase 1: Configuration & Bootstrap
description:

title: [EXIT] P0: Verify stack — all containers start healthy
description:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] docker compose up → sam-postgres healthy, sam-redis healthy
- [ ] docker compose --profile futu up → sam-futu-opend healthy
- [ ] docker compose --profile ib up → sam-ib-gateway starts (may not be healthy without login)
- [ ] docker compose down cleans up all containers
- [ ] No port conflicts

## Tests
- Manual verification: docker compose up, check docker ps, docker compose down

description:

title: Phase 0: Foundation — Skeleton & Docker Stack
description:
## Goal
Empty repo with docker-compose defining all 6 services (sam-trader, sam-postgres, sam-redis, sam-futu-opend, sam-ib-gateway, sam-services). Port Ralph Loop from v2. No trading logic yet.

## Children (9)
- sam-p0-repo: Repo init + directory structure
- sam-p0-scaffold: Python package scaffold
- sam-p0-dockerfile: Dockerfile for sam-trader
- sam-p0-compose: docker-compose.yml with all services
- sam-p0-postgres: PostgreSQL service
- sam-p0-redis: Redis service
- sam-p0-futu-opend: Futu OpenD service
- sam-p0-entrypoint: Entrypoint script
- sam-p0-verify: Verify stack

## Exit
All always-on containers start healthy. Profiles work.

title: EPIC: SAM Trader V3
description:
## Goal
Ground-up rebuild of SAM Trader V3 trading platform on NautilusTrader v1.227.0. FUTUBULL as primary broker, IBKR as secondary. Multi-venue, multi-strategy, decoupled operations.

## Architecture
sam-postgres + sam-redis + sam-futu-opend + sam-ib-gateway (opt) + sam-trader (TradingNode) + sam-services (operations)

## Phases (11)
0. Foundation — Skeleton & Docker Stack
1. Configuration & Bootstrap
2. Futu Market Data Adapter
3. Futu Execution Adapter
4. Futu Instrument Provider & TradingNode Integration
5. IBKR Adapter Re-integration
6. Actors & State Management
7. Strategy Library & Bundle System
8. sam-services Container
9. Pre-Market Pipeline
10. Safety & Dashboard
11. Deploy Script & E2E Validation

## Reference
- Plan: docs/reference/SAM_TRADER_V3_PLAN.md
- Tickets: docs/agent/TICKET_PLAN_V3.md
